# io.github.seanchatmangpt.jotp.test.RegistryRaceStressTest


ProcRegistry race condition test: registration stampede

Tests atomicity of ConcurrentHashMap.putIfAbsent() under concurrent load.



Breaking point under investigation:

- N threads race to register the same name

- Exactly one must win; others get IllegalStateException

- Zero silent overwrites allowed

| Key | Value |
| --- | --- |
| `Result` | `PASS - Exactly one winner` |
| `Atomicity` | `VERIFIED` |
| `Winners` | `1` |
| `Expected winners` | `1` |
| `Competitors` | `100` |
